# flashblade_smb_share_policy (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade SMB share policy by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_smb_share_policy" "example" {
  name = "existing-smb-policy"
}

output "smb_policy_enabled" {
  value = data.flashblade_smb_share_policy.example.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SMB share policy to look up.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) If true, the policy is enabled and its rules are enforced.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SMB share policy.
- `is_local` (Boolean) If true, the policy is local to this array (not replicated).
- `policy_type` (String) The type of the policy (e.g. 'smb').
